# Scripts Directory

This directory contains the PowerShell automation scripts used by the Agentic-ALM-Workflows callable workflows.

## Populating this directory

These scripts are maintained in this repository alongside the callable workflows. To update your local copy when using this repo as a submodule, run:

```powershell
git submodule update --remote .platform
```

Or copy individual files manually as needed.

## Scripts overview

See the [Agentic-ALM-Workflows documentation](https://github.com/mikefactorial/Agentic-ALM-Workflows/blob/main/README.md) for full script documentation.
